description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the mono Docker image and three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a pages job that runs chmod +x build_docs.sh && ./build_docs.sh then moves Documentation/html/ to public/, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and only runs on the master branch. In the test stage add a debug job that first runs msbuild /p:Configuration=\"Debug\" /p:Platform=\"Any CPU\" \"narupa.sln\" and then executes mono packages/NUnit.ConsoleRunner.3.9.0/tools/nunit3-console.exe on each of the debug test DLLs (Narupa.TrajectoryTests.dll, Nano.Science.Simulation.Tests.dll, Nano.Science.Tests.dll, Nano.Tests.dll, Narupa.MD.Tests.dll); it inherits a before_script that installs doxygen via apt-get and restores NuGet packages non-interactively. In the deploy stage add a release job that runs msbuild /p:Configuration=\"Release\" /p:Platform=\"Any CPU\" \"narupa.sln\", stores the bin/release/ directory as an artifact, and runs only on master and develop branches.
